title: ContractManifest
description: Set 068 S5 - the per-set contract-test / CDC declaration. Written as contract-manifest.json beside spec.md at the session-set root by a set that opts into contractGate 'advisory' or 'required'. Declares the operator-authored contract/falsifier command (run verbatim, shell=False, in the Set 068 S1 disposable run_test cage) and the seeded/known defect classes with how each is covered. The close-out gate confirms a valid manifest of this shape exists, that every probeable defect class names at least one covering contract test (the deterministic floor carries it), and that a passing contract-floor-result.json was produced. Non-probeable classes are the residual reserved for the path-aware critique (Set 066/067). This JSON Schema is the STRUCTURAL contract; the runtime gate uses the pure-Python validator ai_router.contract_gate.validate_contract_manifest. See docs/contract-gate.md.

schemaVersion.description: Envelope schema version. 1 = the v1 contract locked in Set 068 S5.

sessionSetName.description: The slug of the session set this manifest covers (the session-set directory basename). The close-out gate confirms it matches the set being closed.

contractGate.description: The policy level this manifest was declared under. Must match the durable contractGate record at close. 'none' is accepted so the enum stays a single source of truth with the per-set attribute, but a 'none' set produces no manifest in practice.

command.description: The operator-authored contract/falsifier argv, passed verbatim to the S1 cage with shell=False (the model never authors it). e.g. ['python', '-m', 'pytest', '-q', 'tests/contract'].

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about the contract suite or coverage decisions.

defectClasses.description: The seeded/known defect classes and how each is covered. At least one. A probeable class MUST name >=1 covering test (the floor carries it); a non-probeable class is the residual reserved for the path-aware agent.

DefectClass.description: One seeded/known defect class. id and description are required and non-empty; probeable is a required boolean; coveredBy is an array of contract-test identifiers (empty for a non-probeable/residual class).

id.description: A stable, set-unique id for this defect class (e.g. 'DC1').

description.description: What the defect class is - the failure mode the contract test falsifies (or the residual the agent must reason about).

probeable.description: True iff a deterministic contract test can falsify this class (Experiment A H4: ~95% of seeded defects are probeable). A probeable class must name >=1 coveredBy test; a non-probeable class is reserved for the path-aware critique.

coveredBy.description: The contract-test identifier(s) (e.g. test names) that cover this class. Required non-empty in practice for a probeable class (enforced by the gate, not this schema); empty/absent for a non-probeable residual class.
